articles.title: Asha Bhosle passes away: Tributes pour in after death of legendary singer
articles.description: Asha Bhosle, India's beloved singing icon and the sister of late Lata Mangeshkar, passed away at 92 on Sunday. She had been admitted to the Breach Candy Hospital in Mumbai on Saturday.

articles.title: Elephant strays into Doddabetta Peak; tourist attraction closed

articles.title: PM Modi expresses condolences over Asha Bhosle's death, calls her ‘iconic and versatile’ voice of India
articles.description: PM Modi expressed sorrow over Asha Bhosle's passing, recognising her as a legendary vocalist whose career enriched India's cultural legacy. He cherished personal interactions with her and extended condolences to her family and fans, affirming her timeless musical impact.
